name: douyin-title-generator
description: 抖音店铺自动上架工具：飞书产品数据 → 飞书海报提示词 → 中转站图片生成 → 飞书标题关键词组合 → 浏览器发布

scripts.auto-listing:pause: npm run build && node dist/src/cli/auto-listing-controller.js pause --text
scripts.auto-listing:resume-ready: npm run build && node dist/src/cli/auto-listing-controller.js resume-ready --text
scripts.auto-listing:hermes-start: npm run build && node dist/src/cli/auto-listing-controller.js start
scripts.auto-listing:hermes-rerun-current-batch: npm run build && node dist/src/cli/auto-listing-controller.js start --rerun-current-batch
scripts.auto-listing:hermes-start:dry: npm run build && node dist/src/cli/auto-listing-controller.js start --dry-run
scripts.auto-listing:hermes-status: npm run build && node dist/src/cli/auto-listing-controller.js status --text
scripts.auto-listing:controller-start: npm run build && node dist/src/cli/auto-listing-controller.js start
scripts.auto-listing:controller-status: npm run build && node dist/src/cli/auto-listing-controller.js status --text
scripts.rules:check: npm run build && node scripts/test-obsolete-provider-removal-rule.mjs && node scripts/test-feishu-cache-contract.mjs && node dist/src/cli/check-rule-integrity.js && node scripts/test-rule-closure-audit.mjs && node scripts/test-md-rule-source-separation.mjs && node scripts/test-shop-category-rules.mjs && node scripts/test-main-image-shop-distribution-rule.mjs && node scripts/test-shop-switch-structure-rule.mjs && node scripts/test-publish-no-coordinate-clicks-rule.mjs && node scripts/test-spec-template-rule.mjs && node scripts/test-publish-module-sequence-rule.mjs && node scripts/test-detail-upload-outcome-rule.mjs && node scripts/test-qualification-image-normalization-rule.mjs && node scripts/test-medical-device-certificate-rule.mjs && node scripts/test-publish-create-page-readiness-rule.mjs && node scripts/test-platform-spu-query-page-rule.mjs && node scripts/test-doudian-publish-session-preflight-rule.mjs && node scripts/test-service-fulfillment-rule.mjs && node scripts/test-browser-cdp-probe-rule.mjs && node scripts/test-browser-cdp-recovery-rule.mjs && node scripts/test-browser-workspace-provider-rule.mjs && node scripts/test-hermes-thin-entry-rule.mjs && node scripts/test-hermes-publish-progress-artifact-rule.mjs && node scripts/test-hermes-gateway-watchdog-rule.mjs && node scripts/test-deepseek-prompt-relevance-rule.mjs && node scripts/test-main-image-reuse-rule.mjs && node scripts/test-archive-main-images-rule.mjs && node scripts/test-image-provider-media-generate-rule.mjs && node scripts/test-image-provider-videos-base64-rule.mjs && node scripts/test-paid-image-submission-ledger.mjs && node scripts/test-paid-image-reconciliation-rule.mjs && node scripts/test-maintenance-residue-rule.mjs && node scripts/test-progress-state.mjs && node scripts/test-publish-manifest-identity-rule.mjs && node scripts/test-feishu-config-source-fields-rule.mjs && node scripts/test-feishu-source-fields-rule.mjs && node scripts/test-feishu-poster-prompts-rule.mjs && node scripts/test-feishu-title-keywords-rule.mjs && node scripts/test-feishu-dynamic-image-prompts-rule.mjs && node scripts/test-feishu-price-inventory-rule.mjs && node scripts/test-feishu-poster-prompt-batch-preflight-rule.mjs
scripts.feishu:check: npm run build && node dist/src/cli/feishu-bitable.js --mode check
scripts.feishu:fields: npm run build && node dist/src/cli/feishu-bitable.js --mode fields
scripts.feishu:records: npm run build && node dist/src/cli/feishu-bitable.js --mode records
scripts.feishu:dump: npm run build && node dist/src/cli/feishu-bitable.js --mode dump
scripts.feishu:assets: npm run build && node dist/src/cli/feishu-bitable.js --mode assets
